package rulefixtures

import (
	grpc "google.golang.org/grpc"
	insecure "google.golang.org/grpc/credentials/insecure"
)

// scenario for grpc_without_tls_credentials: `grpc.Dial(addr, grpc.WithInsecure())` or `grpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials())` in non-test code
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario714Positive(addr string) (*grpc.ClientConn, error) {
	return grpc.Dial(addr, grpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials()))
}
